title: Appappa Lyrics Komban Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Komban Appappa Kaichal Song Lyrics
Singer(s): G.V. Prakash Kumar, Shreya Ghoshal
Music: GV Prakash

Appappa kaaichal vittu pochu
achchacho kadhal novu aaachu.
Muththathil paththu podum pechu.
moththathil enna kanju kaachu.

Paththiyatha murikkaadha unga kayyi
muppaazhil moodaambu  serthu vaiyyi.
oppaama neeyaaga setta seiyyi.

Vetkatha pakkam vandhu paathu
veeraappu pattu pattu pochu.
mallippu koondhal mondhu paathu
machcham un natchathiram aachu.

thappu thandaa seyyaadha
veeran thaandi.
unkitta nadappene
thapppaa thaandi.
oppaeththa maattendi kitta vadi

Veetula maththavanga
paakkaathappa seenduva.
paathutta samaalikka
yaedho onna nonduven.

Paarpaen appa paapaen
andha asattu srippathaan.
aaana edhirpaarpen
andha thiruttu thanathathaan.

Romba akkaraya
velayellaam paakkura.
ambuttum enna paakka
vaikkathaane seyyura.

Un kannu mattumthaandi
ada engo paakkudhu.
aana odambellaam enna
gun-naa thaakkudhu.

Appappa kaaichal vittu pochu
achchacho kadhal novu aaachu.

Sombula thanni mondu
melu koosa oothura.
nenjula saachi vachchi
mundhaanaya thuvattura

podhum idhu podhum
panju panjaa parakkuren.
nenjaa kulikkula
vandhu neechal adukkuren.

Sevvandhi nethimela
pachcha kuththi kaattuna
vellandhi nenju kaaraa
unna vannam theettuven.

Nooru jenmam podhadhaiyya
vaendi kenjuven.
Paasam anbil thaane
peththa thaaya minjuven.

Appappa kaaichal vittu pochu
achchacho kadhal novu aaachu.
Muththathil paththu podum pechu.
moththathil enna kanju kaachu.

Paththiyatha murikkaadha unga kayyi
muppaazhil moodaambu  serthu vaiyyi.
oppaama neeyaaga setta seiyyi.

Vetkatha pakkam vandhu paathu
veeraappu pattu pattu pochu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Appappa?

The song Appappa conveys themes of love and affection, celebrating the joy of being together.

What is the context of this song in the movie Komban?

In Komban, the song plays during a romantic moment, highlighting the deep connection between the characters.

Who are the singers of Appappa?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar and Shreya Ghoshal, both renowned artists in the Tamil music industry.

Who composed the music for Appappa?

The music for Appappa was composed by GV Prakash Kumar, who is also one of the singers.

When was Appappa released?

The song was released on March 5, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Appappa from the movie Komban is a heartfelt duet that encapsulates the joy of love and togetherness. Sung by the talented GV Prakash Kumar and Shreya Ghoshal, it brings a vibrant and romantic vibe that resonates with listeners. The lyrics reflect the playful and affectionate moments shared between lovers, making it an ideal choice for weddings and celebrations. Overall, the song evokes feelings of happiness and nostalgia, leaving a lasting impression.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Appappa from Komban is a delightful duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and celebration. With the enchanting voices of GV Prakash Kumar and Shreya Ghoshal, this song radiates joy and romance, making it a perfect addition to any special occasion. The unique collaboration between these talented artists elevates the song, ensuring it resonates with listeners long after the first listen.
stanzaMeanings: Appa, the love has gone away, oh no, the pain of love has come. In the end, it will be just talk. In the end, what has happened to me?
Don't let your hands be empty, gather the strength and do it. You should be the one to take action.
Coming to the side of the lost, seeing the bravery has gone. The flower has bloomed, and now your star has risen.
The brave one does not make mistakes. I walk towards you without any faults. Don't change your stance, stay firm.
At home, others will not see you. I will take care of you. I will hold you close and protect you.
I see, father, I see, that stubbornness is just a cover. But I will look ahead, that theft is just a matter of time.
There is a lot of work to do, looking at everything. But why are you not letting me see?
Only your eyes are looking at me, but my whole body is being pulled away.
Appa, the love has gone away, oh no, the pain of love has come.
In the pot, the water is boiling, and the steam is rising. In my heart, I have kept the pain and am pushing it away.
This is enough, this is enough, I am flying like a cotton ball. The heat has come into my heart, and I am feeling it.
The red flower on my forehead is showing the green leaf. My heart is burning, I will change your color.
I will seek a hundred lives. In love, I will become the child born from that bond.
Appa, the love has gone away, oh no, the pain of love has come. In the end, it will be just talk. In the end, what has happened to me?
Don't let your hands be empty, gather the strength and do it. You should be the one to take action.
Coming to the side of the lost, seeing the bravery has gone.
